title: cephalophyllum corniculatum
intro: Cephalophyllum corniculatum, also known as the 'horned succulent', is a species of succulent plant belonging to the family Aizoaceae. The medicinal properties of Cephalophyllum corniculatum have been found to contain antimicrobial compounds, which can be used to treat various infections and wounds. This plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, Cephalophyllum corniculatum is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant.
